title: Medications
description: A medication the user is taking, with its dose and schedule — logged manually, from chat, or extracted from a med-label document. The app tracks it over time; it never advises starting, stopping, or changing a medication. Not medical advice.

schedule.description: how often it is taken, e.g. 'once daily'

startedAt.description: when the user started taking it

endedAt.description: when the user stopped taking it (null = ongoing)

refillsRemaining.description: how many refills the user has left (null = unknown/not tracked)

reminderTime.description: preferred daily reminder time as 'HH:MM' (null = no reminder)

doses.description: the recorded/scheduled doses of this medication

interactions.description: literature-backed interaction findings for this medication
